caption: A computer screen displays a Linux environment with several terminal windows open, showing a sequence of technical logs and commands. The interface features a dark theme with various colors of text, including white, green, and yellow. In the initial stages, a terminal window on the left shows logs with repeated entries such as "level=info msg="started" and specific timestamps like "2020-10-28T08:36:21.274598462Z". On the right, another terminal window displays a long list of "msg="tail routine starter" logs and "msg="tail routine starter" entries. As the sequence progresses, the focus shifts, and the window on the right expands to fill more of the screen, showing detailed output from a command involving "kubectl create -f rfluent-oct-configmap.yaml". The text reveals a series of "level=info" messages and mentions of "component=tail", "path=/var/log/syslog", and "msg="downloaded file".
